response.justification: Candidate has strong hands-on engineering experience (~13+ years) across diverse stacks and some teaching/workshop experience, but the resume shows no formal people management, no team leadership role, and no developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure ownership at the scale required. Mobile platform ecosystem exposure is minimal (a single iOS/Apple TV app years ago). The role explicitly requires 2+ years of people management and 3+ years building developer tools, neither of which is evidenced.
strengths: 13+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Demonstrated teaching/mentoring ability via workshops, Selenium course modules, and refactoring dojos
Strong testing/TDD culture and open-source tooling contributions (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No evidence of formal people management or direct reports — role requires 2+ years
Lacks dedicated developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure leadership experience at scale
Minimal mobile platform ecosystem experience; no large-scale mobile build/CI ownership

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering experience and mentoring
